g.text: Blood Resource Reservation Lifecycle - Automatic Release & Error Handling
Channel must be authenticated (true) and encrypted (true)
Every operation must use at least one channel
and affect at least one resource
Constraint: If any channel is unauthenticated
and unencrypted, no state change is allowed.
Only Blood_Bank_Manager and IT_Support have Admin permission
to cancel. Clinical_Team uses Write permission.
Two distinct operations with Write permission
targeting same resource must share initiator
[Write operations on same resource from different initiators]
During reservation period, if system outage occurs
No state change allowed during outage
